store.name: ShopDesk
store.description: ShopDesk is a US-based online fashion store selling casual and everyday clothing and accessories for men, women, and kids.

products.sizing: We offer XS to 3XL in most styles. Each product page has a detailed size guide. If you are between sizes, we recommend sizing up.
products.availability: Products shown on the website are in stock unless marked 'Sold Out'. Restock notifications can be enabled on the product page.

shipping.regions: We ship within the United States and Canada.
shipping.processing: Orders are processed within 1–2 business days, excluding weekends and holidays.

options.standard: 5–7 business days — $5.99 flat rate, free on orders over $75
options.overnight: Next business day — $29.99 flat rate. Orders must be placed before 1:00 PM EST.

shipping.canada: Canadian orders may be subject to customs duties and taxes, which are the customer's responsibility.
shipping.tracking: A tracking link is emailed automatically once your order ships.

returns.eligibility: Items must be unworn, unwashed, in original packaging, with all tags attached.
returns.non_returnable: Undergarments, swimwear, cosmetics, and gift cards are final sale.
returns.final_sale: Clearance, markdown, and holiday promotion items are final sale and cannot be returned or exchanged.
returns.process: Start a return at https://shopdesk.com/returns. A $4.99 return shipping fee is deducted from your refund.
returns.refund_timeline: Refunds are credited to the original payment method within 5–7 business days after warehouse inspection.
returns.exchanges: We do not offer direct exchanges. Return the item for a refund and place a new order.

orders.cancellations: Orders cannot be modified or canceled once placed, as they are immediately sent to fulfillment. Contact support immediately if there's an address error — we'll try our best but cannot guarantee changes.
orders.order_issues: For missing items, wrong items, or damaged goods, email support@shopdesk.com with your order number and a photo if applicable. We'll make it right.
orders.order_status: Check your order status at https://shopdesk.com/orders using your order number and email.

payment.discount_codes: Only one discount code per order. Codes cannot be applied to sale/clearance items or combined with other promotions.
payment.security: All transactions are encrypted and processed securely. We do not store your payment details.

account.creation: Creating an account is optional but recommended — it lets you track orders, save addresses, and view order history.
account.guest_checkout: Guest checkout is fully supported. You'll receive order confirmation and tracking via email.

promotions.newsletter: Subscribe to our newsletter at https://shopdesk.com for 10% off your first order.
promotions.loyalty: We don't have a loyalty program yet, but we're working on it!
promotions.student_discount: We offer a 15% student discount via UNiDAYS. Verify at https://shopdesk.com/student.

support.hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST. Closed on US federal holidays.
support.response_time: We aim to respond to all emails and voicemails within 24 business hours.
support.escalation: If the AI agent cannot resolve your issue, it will offer to connect you with a human support agent.

faqs.gift_wrapping: Gift wrapping is available for $3.99 per item, selectable at checkout.
faqs.gift_cards: Digital gift cards are available in denominations of $25, $50, $100, and $200 at https://shopdesk.com/gift-cards. Gift cards are final sale.
faqs.price_match: We do not offer price matching.
faqs.sustainability: ShopDesk is committed to sustainable packaging. All shipping materials are recyclable or biodegradable.
